title: aspidistra dodecandra
intro: Aspidistra dodecandra, also known as Saptaparni or the 'Snake Gourd', is a plant species belonging to the Asparagaceae family. Traditionally, Aspidistra dodecandra has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. Aspidistra dodecandra is commonly prepared into herbal remedies, including decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat various ailments.
